name: Jasmine Rice with Dried Fruit
recipeIngredient: Salt and Black Pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and set up the dish completely before turning on the stove.
2. Toast the rice until just barely tan in a Wok or large skillet. Remove and set aside.
3. In a large saucepan, heat the butter until it begins to brown.
4. Stir in the onion, celery, and curry powder. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the jasmine rice and cook for 3 minutes longer.
6. Stir well.
7. Stir in the boiling stock and reduce the heat to low. Cover and cook for 20 minutes.
8. Turn off the heat.
9. Stir in the dried cranberries, currants, dried pear, dried fig, sunflower seeds, basil, salt, and pepper to taste. Cover and let sit for 10 minutes.
10. Fluff with a fork and dust with freshly grated nutmeg before serving.
